actions.summary: Fixed incorrect SKILL.md path in cron prompt: ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/feed-collector/SKILL.md (nonexistent) → /data/code/github.com/best/openclaw-skills/feed-collector/SKILL.md (correct extraDirs path). Agent was working despite wrong path because prompt included enough inline instructions, but this ensures the agent can read the full SKILL.md with YAML safety rules, validation steps, and sourceType enum.

Full audit of feed-collector skill. Clean and well-structured. One observation: Step 7 validation script scans ALL blog directories, not just today's — will slow down as repo grows (currently negligible). Not fixing now — Step 8 astro check catches build issues anyway. YAML safety rules (added after ct_016) are well-documented. Discord delivery section confirmed accurate.

gptclub-claude/claude-sonnet-4-6 transient error again (consecutiveErrors=1). 2nd occurrence in 3 cycles (evt_125, evt_127). Error: generic OpenAI 5xx. Only 1 cron job uses this provider. Heartbeat auto-switch has no fallbackChain configured for this model. Monitoring — will create tracker if it occurs a 3rd time.

Grounded WeChat HTML rendering rules from v0.5.0 debugging marathon: verified which tags get styles preserved (<section>, <span>) vs forcibly overridden (<pre>/<code>, <strong>, <a>), and documented all workarounds (section nesting for code, span for bold, p+bullet for lists). 4+ rounds of human-driven fixes distilled into reusable reference.

Added fact-verification guardrail: when citing default values, must verify with source code grep — not from memory or own config. Triggered by concurrency lanes blog incorrectly stating cron default=5 (our config) when source code says ??1. Added rule to distinguish 'our config' from 'system defaults'.

All 3 at verify deadline (evt_129). ct_013 (PR繁简体): No new PR since PR#21/23, no counter-evidence. Extending to evt_131 for next PR opportunity. ct_014 (blog oral style): Concurrency lanes passed style checks, revisions were structural/factual not oral-style — positive signal. Extending to evt_131. ct_015 (Feed model): Sonnet still running, no human decision after 3 days. Will close as accepted-by-silence at evt_131.

Batch convergence closure at deadline. ct_013 (PR繁简体): CONVERGED — PR#23 clean, checklist working, 7 cycles no recurrence. ct_014 (blog oral style): CONVERGED — grep-based pre-flight checklist confirmed effective over 2 blog posts (PR#21/23 revisions were structural/factual, not oral-style). ct_015 (Feed model): CLOSED as accepted-by-silence — 5 days on Sonnet, no human directive. All 16 convergence tracker entries now resolved.

Full audit of discord-thread-archiver. Clean skill: token extraction path verified working, judgment criteria well-defined, curl-based archive approach documented with rate limiting. No issues found. Cron job (ebd691f8) healthy at 97s avg, consecutiveErrors=0. One observation: SKILL.md unchanged since Feb 28 — stable and mature.

Full green: 11/11 crons lastStatus=ok, consecutiveErrors=0. No gateway ERRORs. v2026.3.12 stable. Convergence tracker milestone: 0 open items for first time in PCEC v3 history (16 converged, 0 regressed, 1 closed).

Grounded Codex sandbox network limitation: no internet access causes pnpm install/vitest to timeout. Added workaround (external verification or CC subagent review) and operational rule. Source: 2026-03-13 handshake fix session where Codex self-review failed.

Created work item for unpushed handshake timeout fix. Branch fix/loopback-handshake-timeout has 2 commits (fix + IPv6 test), CC review passed as PR-ready, but not pushed. Risk of being lost across sessions. Blocked on human confirmation.

Full audit post-release. SKILL.md comprehensive (8 gotchas documented with version tags). README tables in sync. Script 396 lines, well-structured. Minor: ul/ol conversion logic duplicated, nested lists unhandled (theoretical, no production signal). Skill is mature. No fix needed.

Grounded cron dual-delivery prevention rules: never use announce + message tool simultaneously, all prompt branches must have message tool calls, K2.5 model suitability guide. Source: 2026-03-14 daily log where human identified 6 jobs with duplicate output.

Grounded CommandLane architecture from 2026-03-13 source code analysis: 3 independent lanes (Main/Subagent/Cron), dual-layer queue (session→global), cron default=1 not 5, key code locations. Prevents re-derivation of this knowledge in future sessions.
ct_017 (Codex sandbox network): open, 1 cycle since creation. ct_018 (cron dual-delivery): NEW, open. wi_003 (handshake PR): still open, awaiting human confirmation. No regressions.

actions.target: ct_019 (K2.5 timeout), ct_018 (dual delivery), wi_003 (handshake PR)
actions.summary: K2.5 transient timeout on DeepRouter (300s, consecutiveErrors=1). Script verified working (<1s). Model issue, not script issue. Created ct_019 to monitor. ct_018 (dual delivery) too early to verify (fixed same day). wi_003 (handshake PR) approaching deadline evt_133 — flagged for closure next cycle if no human response.

Full audit of freshly released skill. 317-line Python script, well-structured. Provider fallback chain clean. SKILL.md comprehensive with setup guide, parameters, troubleshooting. Minor: no per-provider retry (single 429 skips to next), no API call timeout. Neither is critical — cron/agent-level timeouts provide outer safety net. Skill is mature at release.

Batch closure. ct_017 (Codex sandbox network): CONVERGED — 3 cycles, knowledge grounded, no recurrence. ct_019 (K2.5 timeout): CONVERGED early — K2.5 reverted to gpt-5.4 same day, root cause eliminated. wi_003 (handshake PR): CLOSED — deadline reached, no human response, branch preserved locally.

Updated K2.5 section to reflect rollback reality. Was recommending K2.5 for simple ops despite experiment being rolled back same day due to timeout. Now accurately documents gpt-5.4 as current choice with K2.5 failure history.

Full green: 11/11 crons lastStatus=ok, consecutiveErrors=0. No gateway ERRORs. Only open tracker: ct_018 (dual delivery prevention, verify evt_134). Convergence milestone: 17 converged + 2 closed out of 19 total. Events pruned (archived 10 oldest).
ct_018 (cron dual delivery) CONVERGED. All 11 jobs verified delivery.mode:none. 4 cycles since fix, zero recurrence. All convergence trackers now resolved — 18 converged + 2 closed out of 20 total.

Full audit of feed-collector skill and cron. SKILL.md well-structured: 10-step flow, YAML safety rules, mandatory frontmatter validation and build check. Cron correctly runs Mon-Fri only (schedule 1-5). seen.json clean format with 30-day retention. js-yaml dependency confirmed in node_modules. Initial 36h gap alarm was false — March 14-15 is weekend. One observation: seen.json has only 82 entries across 2 days, effective dedup working. Skill is production-mature.

All 11 crons lastStatus=ok, consecutiveErrors=0. No gateway ERRORs today. Transient gpt-5.4 error on 评审工程师 (03-14) self-recovered. Feed cron weekend gap was correctly explained by Mon-Fri schedule. Full green.

Grounded openclaw configure wizard pitfall: CLI wizard silently overwrites default model when registering new provider. Added prevention checklist (verify config.get after wizard, check model/fallbacks/defaults). Source: 2026-03-15 daily log where human caught default model changed to minimax.

Updated model distribution table: K2.5 section archived as historical, MiniMax M2.5-hs migration documented (3 jobs), full 11-job model distribution table added. Reflects current state after K2.5 removal + M2.5 onboarding.
Created tracker for MiniMax M2.5-hs cron migration (3 jobs). Previous K2.5 migration failed within hours (ct_019), so monitoring closely. Verify after evt_138 (3 cycles).

AI Feed cron timeout risk tracked. 591s (03-14) → timeout (03-15 09:00) → 380s (03-15 14:00). Pattern: first-run-of-day may exceed 600s budget due to accumulated content. Monitor for 3 cycles before intervening.

Full audit. Clean judgment/execution separation — skill handles AI verdict, cron adds curl-based archiving. Report format strict with emoji indicators. Performance healthy (111-131s within 300s budget). Cron prompt updated today with detailed curl commands and format spec. No issues found. Production-mature.

MiniMax M2.5-hs migration: 2 cycles stable. All 3 jobs (DeepRouter, version check, project check) lastStatus=ok, consecutiveErrors=0. Duration within budget. Continue monitoring — previous K2.5 migration failed within hours, M2.5-hs at 2 cycles. Note: PCEC self-error at 18:00 CST 03-14 (edit wrong path gep/cron-best-practices.md) was model confusion, self-corrected next run.

Updated model distribution table: 11→13 jobs. Added MiniMax M2.5 standard ×2 (daily cost report + weekly cost report). Table now accurately reflects all cron jobs including newly created usage tracker pair.
ct_020 (M2.5-hs migration): 3rd cycle stable, all 3 jobs ok/consecutiveErrors=0, approaching verify threshold. ct_021 (AI Feed timeout): 2nd cycle, last run 341s ok. Both continue monitoring.

Full green: 13/13 crons lastStatus=ok, consecutiveErrors=0 (including 2 newly created usage tracker jobs). No gateway ERRORs. New openclaw-usage-tracker skill v1.1.0 properly synced in README tables. Quiet cycle — system stable after yesterday's M2.5 migration and usage tracker buildout.

ct_020 (MiniMax M2.5-hs migration) CONVERGED. 4 cycles stable (evt_135→evt_138). All 3 jobs (DeepRouter 67s, version check 130s, project check 121s) running consistently with consecutiveErrors=0. M2.5-hs confirmed viable for simple ops crons.
New tracker: astralor stream_read_error cluster at 21:00 CST 03-15. 4 errors in 40min across opus+sonnet. Provider-level transient outage, no local fix. Monitoring for recurrence.
AI Feed timeout: 3rd monitoring cycle. Last run 513s (ok). Duration fluctuates 341-591s. One timeout at first-run-of-day. Pattern not worsening. 1 more monitoring cycle before deciding.
Increased timeout 600→900s to eliminate marginal first-run-of-day timeouts. Duration pattern 341-591s is variable but bounded. 900s gives 50% headroom without masking real issues.

Full audit of newest skill (831-line Python, created 03-15). Production-mature: clean architecture, robust 3-layer session classification, dual cost calculation, Discord formatting. Noted future concerns: _build_trend duplicates full scan (double-pass), no .jsonl indexing (perf will degrade at scale), no error handling for malformed openclaw.json. No fixes needed now.
ct_021: timeout mitigation applied (600→900s), verify in 3 more cycles. ct_022: zero errors today, no recurrence of astralor stream_read_error, continue monitoring.

Grounded six-model comprehensive evaluation: S/A+/A+/B+/B/C+ rankings, Agent vs text-gen speed divergence, token consumption three-tier analysis (GLM 28k < Claude 55k << MiniMax 421k). Critical for all future model decisions.
Updated model distribution table: 13→14 jobs. Added GLM-5-Turbo section (Thread归档 migration), MiniMax evaluation warning, current 14-job breakdown. Historical K2.5 and M2.5 context preserved.
ct_021 CONVERGED (structural fix). AI Feed split into 采集 (259s) + 播报 (17s) eliminates root cause of single-job timeout. 5 cycles from discovery to structural resolution.

New tracker: MiniMax evaluation underperformance. 5 cron jobs still on M2.5-HS. Eval shows 10-15x token consumption in Agent scenarios, hallucination in semantic tasks. Awaiting human decision on removal. Thread归档 already migrated to GLM-5-Turbo by human.

Updated model distribution table: 14→15 jobs, MiniMax fully replaced by GLM-5-Turbo (7 jobs). Table now reflects actual cron state: opus×2, sonnet×2, gptclub-sonnet×1, glm-5-turbo×7, gpt-5.4×3. Migration history section added with lessons learned.
CONVERGED: astralor stream_read_error cluster (03-15 21:00). 3 clean cycles, zero errors on 03-16. Transient provider outage, no local fix needed.

CONVERGED (early — human executed). MiniMax fully replaced by GLM-5-Turbo across all 7 ops crons within same day as six-model eval. MiniMax count in fleet: 0. Fastest human-intervention resolution in PCEC history.

Added 'Site Code Changes' section with mandatory `npm run build` guardrail. Lesson from 03-16: `astro build` alone missed type errors caught by `astro check`, causing CF deployment failure. Committed+pushed.
Increased timeout 600→900s. Collection-only job timed out at 600s on 18:30 CST (consecutiveErrors=1). Prompt also updated with `npm run build` reminder. New tracker ct_024 opened.
ct_021 regressed: was converged at evt_140 (structural split) but collection job alone still times out under load. ct_024 opened to track collection timeout independently. 23→24 trackers total.

Fixed model distribution table: gpt-5.4 × 3 row removed (OpenLinkOS jobs were already on GLM-5-Turbo), GLM count 7→10. Migration history updated. Table was stale since evt_141 which caught M2.5→GLM but missed gpt-5.4→GLM.
ct_024 (AI Feed 采集 timeout): 1 successful run at 20:30 CST (281s) after timeout increase 600→900s. Need 2 more clean cycles to converge. Next run: 22:30.
ct_025 (model table drift) immediately converged — one-time documentation fix.
Added anti-hallucination guard: explicit instruction to use ONLY listed criteria, never invent thresholds or rules. Defense-in-depth against M2.5-HS-class fabrication on any model. Committed+pushed.
3 clean runs post-timeout-increase (281s, 200s, 200s est). On track for convergence at evt_145.
New tracker for thread-archiver anti-hallucination guard. Immediately converged (one-time preventive fix).

CONVERGED: AI Feed collection timeout saga closed. 10+ clean runs (200-281s) within 900s budget. Architecture split (ct_021) + timeout increase (ct_024) = stable. Total lifecycle: ct_021 discovery -> structural split -> ct_024 spike -> timeout 900s -> convergence at evt_145.

Verified model distribution table accuracy post-03/16 changes: 15 jobs correctly mapped (Opus x2, Sonnet x2, gptclub-Sonnet x1, GLM-5-Turbo x10). OpenRouter monitor and Feed split both reflected. No drift detected.

ct_021 (AI Feed timeout saga) status updated from regressed to superseded. Child tracker ct_024 already converged at evt_145. Full lifecycle: 7 cycles from discovery to structural resolution. All 26 trackers now in terminal state (24 converged, 1 closed, 1 superseded).

Verified: (1) Model distribution table in cron-best-practices.md matches actual 15-job fleet (Opus×2, Sonnet×2, gptclub-Sonnet×1, GLM-5-Turbo×10). (2) Feed collection frontmatter correct — category/collectedAt/pubDatetime all populated in 03-17 articles. (3) Feed broadcast state working (lastBroadcastAt=11:00 CST). (4) OpenRouter balance check script: solid multi-account design with hysteresis. (5) feed-collector SKILL.md v1.8.1 synced with both README tables. No drift detected.

Restructured SKILL.md from 'Three-Phase Cycle' to 'Five-Phase Cycle' (Discover, Fix, Verify, Log, Deliver) to match operational cron prompt. Added convergence tracker archival policy: terminal entries older than 5 cycles → convergence-archive.jsonl.

Archived 23 terminal convergence trackers (ct_001–ct_023, all converged/closed/superseded, oldest at evt_102) to convergence-archive.jsonl. Kept 3 recent entries (ct_024–ct_026). Reduces per-cycle context load from ~4KB to ~0.5KB.

Added anti-hallucination guard to subagent scoring section: explicit constraint to use ONLY the three SKILL.md dimensions (信息增量/内容质量/实用价值), mandatory scoreBreakdown format, rejection rule for non-conforming output. Defense-in-depth against scoring framework drift (same pattern as ct_026 for thread-archiver).

Added 'Cron Prompt ↔ SKILL.md Sync Rules' section: 4-point checklist for verifying cron prompts after SKILL.md updates. Root cause: cron prompt is the direct agent input and overrides SKILL.md when contradictory. Lesson from v1.12.0 Tier contradiction.
Opened 2 new trackers: ct_027 (subagent scoring drift, behavioral-drift) and ct_028 (cron-SKILL sync gap, recurring-pattern). Both verify at evt_151.

Fixed duplicate file numbering (multiple runs/day overlap NNN-slug.md files) by adding max-existing+1 continuation rule. Added required-field completeness check to Step 7: scoreBreakdown must be present and correctly formatted before git commit.
Archived 3 converged trackers (feed timeout, model table, thread archiver guard) to convergence-archive.jsonl.
Opened 2 new trackers: ct_029 (duplicate file numbering) and ct_030 (scoreBreakdown still missing despite v1.12.1 guard — defense-in-depth with Step 7 validation). Both verify at evt_152.

Fixed seen.json structural bug: collection agent was writing URLs at JSON top level instead of inside 'entries' sub-dict, making 18 URLs invisible to dedup. Added structural constraint, post-write verification, and arXiv URL normalization to Step 5a.

Merged 18 misplaced top-level URLs into entries dict. Removed 3 duplicate articles from 2026-03-18 (State of Open Source HF x2, HorizonMath x1). Verified ct_027-030 evidence: scoring framework, file numbering, scoreBreakdown all working correctly in today's runs.
New tracker: seen.json structural bug causing dedup failure. Root cause: Step 5a example format showed flat structure without entries wrapper, agent interpreted literally.
Removed disabled monolithic feed-collector cron. Replaced by split architecture: feed-collect (0ead0a6f) + feed-score (802b31b9).

Added arXiv URL normalization and general URL cleanup rules (utm, anchors) to Step 3. Knowledge gap from architectural refactoring — ct_031 fix existed in old v1.13.1 but wasn't carried to new v1.0.0.

Superseded 4 trackers. All related to monolithic feed-collector's context overload (scoring drift, cron contradiction, numbering collision, missing fields). Root cause resolved by splitting to dedicated feed-collect + feed-score skills.
Added evidence: seen.json structure correct (75 entries, 0 top-level leaks), arXiv URLs all normalized to abs/ format. Split architecture maintaining data integrity across 2 cycles.
New tracker: PCEC timeout at 600s during 15:00 run. Single occurrence during heavy daily-log period (feed pipeline split). Monitoring, no code change yet.
Archived 4 superseded trackers. All related to monolithic feed-collector issues resolved by split architecture.

Added hard guardrails against two observed drifts: (1) scoreBreakdown completeness now validated (must include 信息增量/内容质量/实用价值/减分, including 减分:0), (2) replaced `git add -A` with staging only blog-day paths + allowlist check; also aborts if repo is dirty before scoring.
Updated Phase 1a daily-log reading to be size-aware (wc -l gate: full cat when small; otherwise head + marker grep + tail) to reduce timeout risk when logs are huge.
ct_031 marked converged with 3-cycle clean evidence; ct_032 added evidence_153; ct_033 updated with cron-prompt mitigation and new verify_after; opened ct_034 to verify feed-score guardrails.
Added lightContext:true to prevent GLM-5-turbo timeout from full workspace context injection. Same root cause as heartbeat timeout.
Increased timeout from 300s to 600s. Sonnet model with skill reading + git operations needs more headroom.
Converged ct_031 (seen.json bug) and ct_032 (arXiv normalization) after 3 cycles clean. Opened ct_035 (heartbeat misdiagnosis pattern) and ct_036 (GLM-5-turbo workspace context timeout pattern).
Removed duplicate evt_154 entry (2 identical lines → 1). Data integrity cleanup.

ct_034 feed-score fix verified: 11/11 articles have complete scoreBreakdown with 减分:0, 2 cycles clean. ct_033 PCEC timeout fix working (small-log day). ct_035 heartbeat isolated session running clean (1 cycle). ct_036 heartbeat lightContext confirmed working, thread-archiver awaiting next run.
New tracker: 记忆整合 cron SOUL.md edit failure — benign (content already exists), but patterns of idempotent edit failures should be monitored.
Increased timeout from 600s to 900s for both feed pipeline jobs. Both had consecutiveErrors:2 from timeout. 50% headroom over observed ~350-400s nominal runtime.

Grounded 3 human-intervention lessons as permanent reference: (1) don't script-prompt models, (2) report facts not diagnoses, (3) agent responsibility limits. Triggered by 昊辰 rejecting scripted error-handling in 记忆整合 prompt.
Converged ct_034 (feed-score scoreBreakdown, 3 cycles clean). Opened ct_038 (feed pipeline timeout) and ct_039 (prompt scripting anti-pattern). Updated evidence for ct_033,ct_035,ct_036.
